---
title: "Lightning"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

```{r}

library("nflfastR")
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
pbp <- nflfastR::load_pbp(2010:2025)
```

Filter Data set
```{r}


packers <- pbp |> 
  filter(posteam == 'GB')

packers <- packers |>
  select(season_type,season ,game_id,old_game_id, home_team ,posteam,home_score,away_score ,play_type, pass, rush, yards_gained,result)

packers <- packers |>
  filter(season_type == 'REG' & (play_type == 'pass' | play_type == 'run'))

#View(packers)  

```

#Creating Total Rushing and Passing Yard Values
```{r}
#Creating Total Rushing and Passing Yard Values
packers <- packers |>
  group_by(season) |>
  mutate(
    total_rushing_yds = sum(yards_gained[rush == 1], na.rm = TRUE),
    total_passing_yds = sum(yards_gained[pass == 1], na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |>
  ungroup()
glimpse(packers)

```
#Creating Season_Summary Data
```{r}

season_summary <- packers |>
  group_by(season)|>
  summarise(total_rushing_yds = sum(yards_gained[rush == 1], na.rm = TRUE),
            total_passing_yds = sum(yards_gained[pass == 1], na.rm = TRUE),
            total_yds = (total_rushing_yds + total_passing_yds),
            wins = length(unique(game_id[if_else(home_team == 'GB', result>0, result<0 )])),
            losses = length(unique(game_id[if_else(home_team == 'GB', result<0, result>0 )])),
            ties = length(unique(game_id[result==0]))
            )
season_summary

```
#Plotting
```{r}


#total passing
p1 <- season_summary |>
  ggplot(aes(factor(season),total_passing_yds))+
  geom_col(fill = "#203731", width= .7) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))+
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(3000,5000))+
  labs(
    title = "Total Passing Yards per Season",
    x = "Season",
    y = "Yards"
  ) 
#total rushing
p2 <- season_summary |>
  ggplot(aes(factor(season),total_rushing_yds))+
  geom_col(fill = "#FFB612", width= .7) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))+
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(700,2500))+
  labs(
    title = "Total Rushing Yards per Season",
    x = "Season",
    y = "Yards"
  ) 
  
#total yds
p3<- season_summary |>
  ggplot(aes(factor(season),total_yds))+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))+
  geom_col(fill = "#FFB612", width= .7) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(4000,7000))+
  labs(
    title = "Total Yards per Season",
    x = "Season",
    y = "Yards"
  )

#Wins
p4<-season_summary |>
  ggplot(aes(factor(season),wins))+
  geom_col(fill = "#203731", width= .7) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))+
  geom_text(aes(label = wins), vjust = -0.5, size = 3)+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 16, by = 2)) +
  labs(
    title = "Total Wins",
    x = "Season",
    y = "Wins"
  )


ggsave("passing_yds.png", p1, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)
ggsave("rushing_yds.png", p2, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)
ggsave("total_yds.png", p3, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)
ggsave("wins.png", p4, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)

```

#Packers Offense vs Def averages
```{r}

packers_seasonal_stats <- packers |>
  
  distinct(game_id, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
  mutate(
    pts_scored = if_else(home_team == "GB", home_score, away_score),
    pts_allowed = if_else(home_team == "GB", away_score, home_score)
  ) |>
  group_by(season) |>
  summarise(
    avg_pts_scored = mean(pts_scored, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_pts_allowed = mean(pts_allowed, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |>
  ungroup()

print(packers_seasonal_stats)

p5 <- packers_seasonal_stats |>
  ggplot(aes(x = avg_pts_allowed, y = avg_pts_scored)) +
    
    geom_vline(xintercept = mean(packers_seasonal_stats$avg_pts_allowed), 
               linetype = "dashed", color = "gray70") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = mean(packers_seasonal_stats$avg_pts_scored), 
               linetype = "dashed", color = "gray70") +
    
    geom_point(color = "#203731", size = 4) + 
    
    geom_text(aes(label = season), vjust = -1, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold") +
    
    labs(
      title = "Packers Offensive vs. Defensive Efficiency (2010-2025)",
      x = "Avg Points Allowed (Defense)",
      y = "Avg Points Scored (Offense)"
    ) +
    expand_limits(y = c(min(packers_seasonal_stats$avg_pts_scored) - 2, 
                        max(packers_seasonal_stats$avg_pts_scored) + 2))

p7 <- packers_seasonal_stats |>
  ggplot(aes(factor(season), avg_pts_allowed))+
  geom_col(fill = "#FFB612", width= .7) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))+
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(10,35)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(avg_pts_allowed,1)), vjust = -0.5, size = 3)+
  labs(
    
    x = "Season",
    y = "Points Allowed"
  )

p8 <- packers_seasonal_stats |>
  ggplot(aes(factor(season), avg_pts_scored))+
  geom_col(fill = "#203731", width= .7) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1))+
  coord_cartesian(ylim=c(10,35)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(avg_pts_scored,1)), vjust = -0.5, size = 3)+
  labs(
    
    x = "Season",
    y = "Points Allowed"
  )

ggsave("OffvsDef.png", p5, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)
ggsave("AvgAllowed.png", p7, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)
ggsave("AvgScored.png", p8, width = 6, height = 4, dpi = 300)


```


#Packer 2010 Stats
```{r}
#Packers 2010-2011 Stats
pack2010 <- pbp |>
  filter(season == 2010 & (home_team =='GB' | away_team == 'GB'))

pack_2010_stats <- pack2010|>
  distinct(game_id, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
  mutate(
    pts_scored = if_else(home_team == "GB", home_score, away_score),
    pts_allowed = if_else(home_team == "GB", away_score, home_score)
  ) |>
  summarise(
    avg_pts_scored = mean(pts_scored, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_pts_allowed = mean(pts_allowed, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) 

pack2010|>
  filter(season_type == 'REG',play == 1,posteam == 'GB')|>
  mutate(total_rushing_yds = sum(yards_gained[rush == 1], na.rm = TRUE),
          total_passing_yds = sum(yards_gained[pass == 1], na.rm = TRUE),
          total_yds = (total_rushing_yds + total_passing_yds),
          avg_rushing = total_rushing_yds/16,
         avg_passing = total_passing_yds/16,
         avg_yds = total_yds/16
         )|>
  summarise(total_rushing_yds = sum(yards_gained[rush == 1], na.rm = TRUE),
              total_passing_yds = sum(yards_gained[pass == 1], na.rm = TRUE),
              total_yds = (total_rushing_yds + total_passing_yds),
              wins = length(unique(game_id[if_else(home_team == 'GB', result>0, result<0 )])),
              losses = length(unique(game_id[if_else(home_team == 'GB', result<0, result>0 )])),
              ties = length(unique(game_id[result==0]))
            )



library(patchwork) #can create grid of plots
library(ggforce) #has geom_circle

#Admittedly Used Ai for this next section, I did not know how to create circles
#and it provided me a function which is the reasonable as to not have redundant code
plot_metric <- function(value, label, color = "#203731") {
  ggplot() +
    
    geom_circle(aes(x0 = 0, y0 = 0, r = 1), 
                fill = "#FFB612", color = color, size = 2) +
    annotate("text", x = 0, y = 0.1, label = value, 
             size = 12, fontface = "bold", color = color) +
    annotate("text", x = 0, y = -0.4, label = label, 
             size = 4, fontface = "bold", color = "gray40") +
    coord_fixed() +
    theme_void() 
}

#Create Four instances of the circle function
#uses data found above
m1 <- plot_metric("24.2", "AVG POINTS\nSCORED")
m2 <- plot_metric("15.0", "AVG POINTS\nALLOWED")
m3 <- plot_metric("4,131", "PASSING\nYARDS")
m4 <- plot_metric("1,608", "RUSHING\nYARDS")


p6 <- (m1 + m2) / (m3 + m4) + 
  plot_annotation(
    title = '2010 Season Analytics',
    theme = theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, family = "serif"),
    )
  )

ggsave("2010Season.png",p6,width = 6, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```



#For fun stuff
```{r}
#this was merely curiosity to see how the packers lined up against the patriots
#the results were very interesting showing that statistically the packers had far better teams than the patriots

patriots_stats <- pbp |>
  filter(season_type == 'REG')|>
  filter(season >= 2010 & season <= 2025) |>
  # One row per game to get final scores
  distinct(game_id, .keep_all = TRUE) |>
  # Identify points scored vs allowed based on home/away status
  mutate(
    pts_scored = if_else(home_team == "NE", home_score, away_score),
    pts_allowed = if_else(home_team == "NE", away_score, home_score)
  ) |>
  group_by(season) |>
  summarise(
    avg_pts_scored = mean(pts_scored, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_pts_allowed = mean(pts_allowed, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |>
  ungroup()

ggplot(patriots_stats, aes(x = avg_pts_allowed, y = avg_pts_scored)) +

  geom_vline(xintercept = mean(patriots_stats$avg_pts_allowed), 
             linetype = "dashed", color = "gray70") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = mean(patriots_stats$avg_pts_scored), 
             linetype = "dashed", color = "gray70") +
  

  geom_point(color = "#002244", size = 4) + 
  geom_text(aes(label = season), vjust = -1.2, size = 3.5, fontface = "bold",alpha= .5) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Patriots Offensive vs. Defensive Efficiency (2010-2025)",
    x = "Avg Points Allowed (Defense)",
    y = "Avg Points Scored (Offense)"
  ) +
  # Stretch the axes so labels don't get cut off
  expand_limits(y = c(min(patriots_stats$avg_pts_scored) - 3, 
                      max(patriots_stats$avg_pts_scored) + 3)) +
  theme_minimal()



# Combine the Packers and Patriots stats
combined_stats <- bind_rows(
  packers_seasonal_stats |> mutate(team = "Packers"),
  patriots_stats |> mutate(team = "Patriots")
)

ggplot(combined_stats, aes(x = avg_pts_allowed, y = avg_pts_scored, color = team)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = mean(combined_stats$avg_pts_allowed), 
             linetype = "dashed", color = "gray80") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = mean(combined_stats$avg_pts_scored), 
             linetype = "dashed", color = "gray80") +
  

  geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_text(aes(label = season), vjust = -1.2, size = 3, fontface = "bold", show.legend = FALSE) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Packers" = "#203731", "Patriots" = "#002244")) +
  labs(
    title = "Offensive vs. Defensive Efficiency: Packers vs. Patriots",
    x = "Avg Points Allowed (Defense)",
    y = "Avg Points Scored (Offense)",
    color = "Team"
  ) +
  expand_limits(y = c(min(combined_stats$avg_pts_scored) - 2, 
                      max(combined_stats$avg_pts_scored) + 2)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
```
